steps.title: Read the rate of change
steps.content:
The function is:
$$
T(x)=67-8x
$$
The coefficient of $x$ is $-8$, so the temperature changes by $-8$ degrees Fahrenheit each hour.

steps.title: Convert drop to decrease
steps.content: A change of $-8$ degrees means the temperature decreases by $8$ degrees each hour.

steps.title: Choose the hourly decrease
steps.content: The estimated decrease per hour is $8$ degrees Fahrenheit. The answer is B.
